ddls:
CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job */,
  "submitter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workstation that submitted the job */,
  "uuid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the job */,
  "submit_time" INTEGER /* Time when the job was submitted (since Java epoch) */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the job (in milliseconds) */,
  "total_runtime" INTEGER /* Total runtime from start to result receipt (in milliseconds) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the job */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the job */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the job execution */,
  "retries" INTEGER /* Number of times the job has been retried */,
  "last_retry_time" INTEGER /* Time when the job was last retried (since Java epoch) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the job */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the job */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Time when the job was created (since Java epoch) */,
  "updated_at" INTEGER /* Time when the job was last updated (since Java epoch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_submitter_id FOREIGN KEY ("submitter_id") REFERENCES workstations ("workstation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workstations" (
  "workstation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workstation */,
  "workstation_name" TEXT /* Name of the workstation */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the workstation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the workstation */,
  "last_checked_in" INTEGER /* Last time the workstation checked in (since Java epoch) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the workstation entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the workstation entry */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Time when the workstation entry was created (since Java epoch) */,
  "updated_at" INTEGER /* Time when the workstation entry was last updated (since Java epoch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workstation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workstations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workstations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" INTEGER /* Time when the user last logged in (since Java epoch) */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Time when the user account was created (since Java epoch) */,
  "updated_at" INTEGER /* Time when the user account was last updated (since Java epoch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the job data */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the job data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Time when the access log was created (since Java epoch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job history entry */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job */,
  "submit_time" INTEGER /* Time when the job was submitted (since Java epoch) */,
  "start_time" INTEGER /* Time when the job started executing (since Java epoch) */,
  "end_time" INTEGER /* Time when the job finished executing (since Java epoch) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the job execution */,
  "retries" INTEGER /* Number of times the job was retried */,
  "last_retry_time" INTEGER /* Time when the job was last retried (since Java epoch) */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Time when the job history entry was created (since Java epoch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_history_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)
